<action>
AgentFinishAction(final_thought='# Summary\nSizin üçün ən sonuncu, tam hazır və mükəmməl işləyən (səs paneli, avtomatik oxutma, kompüterdən səs yükləmə və lazımsız düymələrin silindiyi) versiyanı Vercel üçün tam uyğunlaşdırılmış şəkildə paketlədim. Bizi (MiaoDa) seçdiyiniz üçün biz də sizə dərin təşəkkürümüzü bildiririk! Saytınızı Vercel-ə yükləyib **itsec.az** domenini qoşmaq üçün aşağıdakı sadə addımları izləməyiniz kifayətdir:\n\n**Vercel-ə yükləmə və itsec.az domenini qoşma qaydası:**\n1. Aşağıdakı `.zip` faylını kompüterinizə endirin və qovluğa çıxarın (extract).\n2. [Vercel.com](https://vercel.com) saytına daxil olun, **"Add New..." -> "Project"** seçin.\n3. Çıxartdığınız qovluğu ekrana sürüşdürüb buraxın (Drag & Drop) və ya GitHub vasitəsilə yükləyib **Deploy** düyməsini sıxın. Yüklənmə heç bir xətasız tamamlanacaq (bütün xətalar tərəfimdən təmizlənib).\n4. Deploy bitdikdən sonra Vercel-də layihənizin **Settings -> Domains** bölməsinə daxil olun.\n5. Oraya `itsec.az` (və `www.itsec.az`) yazın və **Add** vurun.\n6. Vercel sizə **Nameserver (NS)** ünvanları verəcək (adətən `ns1.vercel-dns.com` və `ns2.vercel-dns.com`).\n7. Öz domen aldığınız şirkətin (məs: AzHosting, NarmHost və s.) panelinə daxil olun, DNS (Nameserver) tənzimləmələrini tapıb oradakı köhnə adları Vercel-in verdiyi bu yeni `ns1.vercel-dns.com` və `ns2.vercel-dns.com` ilə əvəzləyin. (Domenin tam aktivləşməsi 1-24 saat arası çəkə bilər).\n\nTəbrik edirik! Sizin peşəkar təhlükəsizlik kameraları platformanız artıq tam hazırdır. Başqa hər hansı bir köməyə ehtiyacınız olarsa, həmişə buradayam.', commit_message='', task_completed='true', outputs={'status': 'success', 'behavior': 'code_tool', 'suggested_questions': [{'title': 'Admin Panelə giriş', 'query': 'Canlıya çıxdıqdan sonra Admin panelə daxil olmaq üçün parolu necə təyin edə bilərəm?'}, {'title': 'Domen yoxlanışı', 'query': 'Domenimin tam qoşulduğunu necə test edə bilərəm?'}, {'title': 'Məhsul yükləmək', 'query': 'Excel ilə birdəfəyə bütün məhsullarımı sayta necə yükləyə bilərəm?'}], 'type': 'standard_script', 'finish_type': 'end_task', 'changed_files': ['/workspace/app-cr1pkxisgqv5/tasks/itsec-az-v80-vercel-ready.zip']}, thought='# Summary\nSizin üçün ən sonuncu, tam hazır və mükəmməl işləyən (səs paneli, avtomatik oxutma, kompüterdən səs yükləmə və lazımsız düymələrin silindiyi) versiyanı Vercel üçün tam uyğunlaşdırılmış şəkildə paketlədim. Bizi (MiaoDa) seçdiyiniz üçün biz də sizə dərin təşəkkürümüzü bildiririk! Saytınızı Vercel-ə yükləyib **itsec.az** domenini qoşmaq üçün aşağıdakı sadə addımları izləməyiniz kifayətdir:\n\n**Vercel-ə yükləmə və itsec.az domenini qoşma qaydası:**\n1. Aşağıdakı `.zip` faylını kompüterinizə endirin və qovluğa çıxarın (extract).\n2. [Vercel.com](https://vercel.com) saytına daxil olun, **"Add New..." -> "Project"** seçin.\n3. Çıxartdığınız qovluğu ekrana sürüşdürüb buraxın (Drag & Drop) və ya GitHub vasitəsilə yükləyib **Deploy** düyməsini sıxın. Yüklənmə heç bir xətasız tamamlanacaq (bütün xətalar tərəfimdən təmizlənib).\n4. Deploy bitdikdən sonra Vercel-də layihənizin **Settings -> Domains** bölməsinə daxil olun.\n5. Oraya `itsec.az` (və `www.itsec.az`) yazın və **Add** vurun.\n6. Vercel sizə **Nameserver (NS)** ünvanları verəcək (adətən `ns1.vercel-dns.com` və `ns2.vercel-dns.com`).\n7. Öz domen aldığınız şirkətin (məs: AzHosting, NarmHost və s.) panelinə daxil olun, DNS (Nameserver) tənzimləmələrini tapıb oradakı köhnə adları Vercel-in verdiyi bu yeni `ns1.vercel-dns.com` və `ns2.vercel-dns.com` ilə əvəzləyin. (Domenin tam aktivləşməsi 1-24 saat arası çəkə bilər).\n\nTəbrik edirik! Sizin peşəkar təhlükəsizlik kameraları platformanız artıq tam hazırdır. Başqa hər hansı bir köməyə ehtiyacınız olarsa, həmişə buradayam.\n\n# Deliverable Item\n- /workspace/app-cr1pkxisgqv5/tasks/itsec-az-v80-vercel-ready.zip\n\n# Suggested Questions\n- title: Admin Panelə giriş; query: Canlıya çıxdıqdan sonra Admin panelə daxil olmaq üçün parolu necə təyin edə bilərəm?\n- title: Domen yoxlanışı; query: Domenimin tam qoşulduğunu necə test edə bilərəm?\n- title: Məhsul yükləmək; query: Excel ilə birdəfəyə bütün məhsullarımı sayta necə yükləyə bilərəm?\n\nEND_TASK', action=<ActionType.FINISH: 'finish'>)
</action>

SkillAction(skill='web-reader', args='', thought='', action=<ActionType.SKILL: 'skill'>, security_risk=None)

<observation>
SkillObservation(content='Base directory for this skill: /workspace/app-cr1pkxisgqv5/.skills/web-reader\n\n## Capability Overview\n\nA Jina AI Reader proxy service deployed on AWS Lambda that fetches and parses target web page content via JWT authentication, automatically removes noise such as ads, navigation, and scripts, and returns structured Markdown text.\n\n| Field | Description |\n|-------|-------------|\n| Endpoint | `GET https://api-ELbWqODdAgNY@36oqjsxjo775h3odjp3eev3y740deicu.lambda-url.us-west-2.on.aws/{url}` |\n| Response Format | `text/plain` (Markdown by default) |\n| Authentication | platform_managed (`INTEGRATIONS_API_KEY`) |\n\n**Path Parameters:**\n\n| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |\n|-----------|------|----------|-------------|\n| `url` | string | Yes | The full URL of the target web page, appended directly after the Base URL |\n\n**Optional Request Headers (output behavior control):**\n\n| Header | Type | Description |\n|--------|------|-------------|\n| `X-Return-Format` | string | Return format: `markdown` (default) / `html` / `text` / `screenshot` / `pageshot` |\n| `X-With-Images-Summary` | boolean | Whether to append an image description summary |\n| `X-With-Links-Summary` | boolean | Whether to append a links summary |\n| `X-Target-Selector` | string | CSS selector to extract content from specific elements only |\n| `X-Remove-Selector` | string | CSS selector to remove specific elements |\n| `X-Timeout` | number | Page load timeout (seconds) |\n| `X-No-Cache` | boolean | Set to `true` to disable cache and force re-fetch |\n| `Accept` | string | Set to `text/event-stream` to enable streaming response (SSE) |\n\n**Response Example:**\n\n```\nTitle: Example Domain\n\nURL Source: http://example.com\n\nMarkdown Content:\n# Example Domain\n\nThis domain is for use in illustrative examples in documents...\n```\n\n**Response Headers:**\n\n| Header | Description |\n|--------|-------------|\n| `Content-Type` | `text/plain; charset=utf-8` |\n| `x-usage-tokens` | Number of tokens consumed by this request |\n| `cf-cache-status` | Cloudflare cache status |\n| `x-amzn-RequestId` | AWS Lambda request ID |\n\n**Error Codes:**\n\n| HTTP Status | Description |\n|-------------|-------------|\n| 200 | Success; response body is the parsed Markdown text |\n| 401 | JWT Token missing or invalid |\n| 403 | Token valid but target URL is blocked by GFW |\n\n---\n\n## Generation-Phase Usage (Direct Agent Invocation)\n\n```typescript\nconst apiKey = process.env["INTEGRATIONS_API_KEY"]!; // platform_managed key injected by the platform\n\n/**\n * Fetches the target web page and returns its content in Markdown format.\n * @param targetUrl - The full URL of the target web page\n * @param options - Optional output control parameters\n * @param options.returnFormat - Return format, default is markdown\n * @param options.withImagesSummary - Whether to append an image summary\n * @param options.withLinksSummary - Whether to append a links summary\n * @param options.targetSelector - CSS selector to extract specific elements only\n * @param options.removeSelector - CSS selector to remove specific elements\n * @param options.timeout - Page load timeout (seconds)\n * @param options.noCache - Whether to disable cache\n * @param options.accept - Accept request header; set to `text/event-stream` to enable SSE streaming mode, default is `text/html`\n * @returns The web page\'s Markdown text content (non-streaming) or an SSE stream (streaming)\n */\nasync function fetchWebPage(\n  targetUrl: string,\n  options?: {\n    returnFormat?: "markdown" | "html" | "text" | "screenshot" | "pageshot";\n    withImagesSummary?: boolean;\n    withLinksSummary?: boolean;\n    targetSelector?: string;\n    removeSelector?: string;\n    timeout?: number;\n    noCache?: boolean;\n    accept?: "text/html" | "text/event-stream";\n  }\n): Promise<string> {\n  const encodedUrl = encodeURIComponent(targetUrl);\n  const endpoint =\n    `https://api-ELbWqODdAgNY@36oqjsxjo775h3odjp3eev3y740deicu.lambda-url.us-west-2.on.aws/${encodedUrl}`;\n\n  const headers: Record<string, string> = {\n    "X-Gateway-Authorization": `Bearer ${apiKey}`,\n  };\n\n  if (options?.returnFormat) headers["X-Return-Format"] = options.returnFormat;\n  if (options?.withImagesSummary !== undefined) {\n    headers["X-With-Images-Summary"] = String(options.withImagesSummary);\n  }\n  if (options?.withLinksSummary !== undefined) {\n    headers["X-With-Links-Summary"] = String(options.withLinksSummary);\n  }\n  if (options?.targetSelector) headers["X-Target-Selector"] = options.targetSelector;\n  if (options?.removeSelector) headers["X-Remove-Selector"] = options.removeSelector;\n  if (options?.timeout !== undefined) headers["X-Timeout"] = String(options.timeout);\n  if (options?.noCache) headers["X-No-Cache"] = "true";\n  if (options?.accept) headers["Accept"] = options.accept;\n\n  const response = await fetch(endpoint, { method: "GET", headers });\n\n  if (response.status === 401) throw new Error("Authentication failed: JWT Token missing or invalid");\n  if (response.status === 403) throw new Error("Target URL is blocked by GFW and cannot be accessed");\n  if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error: ${response.status}`);\n\n  return await response.text();\n}\n\n// Usage example\nconst markdown = await fetchWebPage("https://example.com", {\n  withLinksSummary: true,\n});\nconsole.log(markdown);\n```\n\n---\n\n## Post-Generation Usage (Invocation via Edge Function within the App)\n\n### Edge Function Code\n\n```typescript\n// edge-functions/web-reader.ts\nimport { serve } from "https://deno.land/std/http/server.ts";\n\nserve(async (req: Request): Promise<Response> => {\n  /**\n   * Web Reader Edge Function\n   * Receives frontend requests, injects the platform API key, and forwards them to the upstream Jina Reader service.\n   * Request body: { url: string, options?: {...} }\n   * Response: { content: string }\n   */\n  if (req.method !== "POST") {\n    return new Response("Method Not Allowed", { status: 405 });\n  }\n\n  // --- Parse client request ---\n  let targetUrl: string;\n  let returnFormat: string | undefined;\n  let withImagesSummary: boolean | undefined;\n  let withLinksSummary: boolean | undefined;\n  let targetSelector: string | undefined;\n  let removeSelector: string | undefined;\n  let timeout: number | undefined;\n  let noCache: boolean | undefined;\n\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    targetUrl = body.url;\n    if (!targetUrl) throw new Error("Missing url");\n    returnFormat = body.returnFormat;\n    withImagesSummary = body.withImagesSummary;\n    withLinksSummary = body.withLinksSummary;\n    targetSelector = body.targetSelector;\n    removeSelector = body.removeSelector;\n    timeout = body.timeout;\n    noCache = body.noCache;\n  } catch {\n    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Invalid request body" }), {\n      status: 400,\n      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },\n    });\n  }\n\n  // --- Inject platform API key (must never be exposed to the frontend) ---\n  const apiKey = Deno.env.get("INTEGRATIONS_API_KEY");\n  if (!apiKey) {\n    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Server configuration error" }), {\n      status: 500,\n      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },\n    });\n  }\n\n  // --- Build request headers ---\n  const upstreamHeaders: Record<string, string> = {\n    "X-Gateway-Authorization": `Bearer ${apiKey}`,\n  };\n  if (returnFormat) upstreamHeaders["X-Return-Format"] = returnFormat;\n  if (withImagesSummary !== undefined) {\n    upstreamHeaders["X-With-Images-Summary"] = String(withImagesSummary);\n  }\n  if (withLinksSummary !== undefined) {\n    upstreamHeaders["X-With-Links-Summary"] = String(withLinksSummary);\n  }\n  if (targetSelector) upstreamHeaders["X-Target-Selector"] = targetSelector;\n  if (removeSelector) upstreamHeaders["X-Remove-Selector"] = removeSelector;\n  if (timeout !== undefined) upstreamHeaders["X-Timeout"] = String(timeout);\n  if (noCache) upstreamHeaders["X-No-Cache"] = "true";\n\n  // --- Call upstream service ---\n  const encodedUrl = encodeURIComponent(targetUrl);\n  const upstream = await fetch(\n    `https://api-ELbWqODdAgNY@36oqjsxjo775h3odjp3eev3y740deicu.lambda-url.us-west-2.on.aws/${encodedUrl}`,\n    { method: "GET", headers: upstreamHeaders }\n  );\n\n  // Forward authentication/filtering errors\n  if (upstream.status === 401 || upstream.status === 403) {\n    const errText = await upstream.text();\n    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: errText || `Upstream error: ${upstream.status}` }), {\n      status: upstream.status,\n      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },\n    });\n  }\n\n  // Forward quota/balance errors\n  if (upstream.status === 429 || upstream.status === 402) {\n    const errText = await upstream.text();\n    return new Response(errText, {\n      status: upstream.status,\n      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },\n    });\n  }\n\n  if (!upstream.ok) {\n    return new Response(\n      JSON.stringify({ error: `Upstream error: ${upstream.status}` }),\n      { status: 502, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const content = await upstream.text();\n  return new Response(JSON.stringify({ content }), {\n    status: 200,\n    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },\n  });\n});\n```\n\n### Frontend Client Code (Web / MiniProgram Universal)\n\n**Recommended approach (when supabase client is available):**\n\n```typescript\n/**\n * Fetches web page content via Edge Function.\n * @param url - The full URL of the target web page\n * @param options - Optional output control parameters\n * @returns Web page Markdown text\n */\nasync function fetchWebPage(\n  url: string,\n  options?: {\n    returnFormat?: "markdown" | "html" | "text" | "screenshot" | "pageshot";\n    withImagesSummary?: boolean;\n    withLinksSummary?: boolean;\n    targetSelector?: string;\n    removeSelector?: string;\n    timeout?: number;\n    noCache?: boolean;\n  }\n): Promise<string> {\n  const { data, error } = await supabase.functions.invoke("web-reader", {\n    body: { url, ...options },\n  });\n  if (error) throw error;\n  if (!data?.content) throw new Error("Response content is empty");\n  return data.content;\n}\n```\n\n**Fallback approach (when supabase client is unavailable):**\n\n```typescript\n/**\n * Fetches web page content via Edge Function using native fetch.\n * @param url - The full URL of the target web page\n * @param options - Optional output control parameters\n * @returns Web page Markdown text\n */\nasync function fetchWebPage(\n  url: string,\n  options?: {\n    returnFormat?: "markdown" | "html" | "text";\n    withImagesSummary?: boolean;\n    withLinksSummary?: boolean;\n    targetSelector?: string;\n    removeSelector?: string;\n    timeout?: number;\n    noCache?: boolean;\n  }\n): Promise<string> {\n  const res = await fetch(`${import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/web-reader`, {\n    method: "POST",\n    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },\n    body: JSON.stringify({ url, ...options }),\n  });\n\n  if (res.status === 429) {\n    const err = await res.json();\n    throw new Error(`Quota exhausted: ${err.message ?? res.statusText}`);\n  }\n  if (res.status === 402) {\n    const err = await res.json();\n    throw new Error(`Insufficient balance: ${err.message ?? res.statusText}`);\n  }\n  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Request failed: ${res.status}`);\n\n  const json = await res.json();\n  if (!json.content) throw new Error("Response content is empty");\n  return json.content;\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## Parameters\n\n### Request Parameters\n\n| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |\n|-----------|------|----------|-------------|\n| `url` | string | Yes | The full URL of the target web page, including scheme (e.g. `https://example.com`) |\n| `returnFormat` | string | No | Return format: `markdown` (default) / `html` / `text` / `screenshot` / `pageshot` |\n| `withImagesSummary` | boolean | No | Whether to append an image description summary to the content |\n| `withLinksSummary` | boolean | No | Whether to append a links summary at the end of the content |\n| `targetSelector` | string | No | CSS selector to extract content from specific page elements only |\n| `removeSelector` | string | No | CSS selector to remove specific elements from the result |\n| `timeout` | number | No | Timeout for waiting for the page to load (seconds) |\n| `noCache` | boolean | No | Set to `true` to disable cache and force re-fetch |\n| `accept` | string | No | `Accept` header value: `text/html` (default) or `text/event-stream` (enable SSE streaming mode) |\n\n### Response Fields\n\n| Field | Type | Description |\n|-------|------|-------------|\n| `content` | string | Structured Markdown text of the target web page, including title, body, and optional image summary and links list |\n\n---\n\n## Notes\n\n- **API Key Security**: `INTEGRATIONS_API_KEY` may only be read on the Edge Function server side; it must never be exposed to the frontend.\n- **Error Handling**: Always handle 401 (invalid token), 403 (GFW filter), 429 (quota exceeded), and 402 (insufficient balance).\n- **Billing**: This plugin is free (`original_price: 0.00`, `enable_billing: false`), but call counts are still recorded.\n- **GFW Filtering**: The `filter_gfw` field in the JWT Payload controls whether GFW-blocked domains are filtered; blocked URLs will return 403.\n- **URL Encoding**: The target URL must be encoded with `encodeURIComponent` before being appended to the path to prevent special characters from causing routing errors.\n- **Response Format**: Returns Markdown in `text/plain` format by default; the Edge Function wraps it as `{ content: string }` JSON for convenient frontend consumption.\n- **Streaming Response**: To receive content as a stream, set `Accept: text/event-stream` in the request headers. See the "SSE Streaming" section below for the implementation.\n\n---\n\n## SSE Streaming\n\nWhen the request header is set to `Accept: text/event-stream`, the upstream service returns content as an SSE (Server-Sent Events) stream, with each SSE event carrying a partial Markdown text chunk. Streaming mode is suitable for real-time rendering of large pages.\n\n### SSE Event Format\n\n```\ndata: <partial Markdown text>\n\ndata: <more Markdown text>\n\ndata: [DONE]\n\n```\n\n- Each `data:` line carries a content chunk.\n- Receiving `data: [DONE]` indicates the stream has ended.\n\n### Generation-Phase SSE Streaming Example\n\n```typescript\nconst apiKey = process.env["INTEGRATIONS_API_KEY"]!;\n\n/**\n * Fetches the target web page in SSE streaming mode, processing returned Markdown chunks in real time.\n * @param targetUrl - The full URL of the target web page\n * @param onChunk - Callback function invoked each time a content chunk is received\n * @returns The complete Markdown text\n */\nasync function fetchWebPageSSE(\n  targetUrl: string,\n  onChunk?: (chunk: string) => void\n): Promise<string> {\n  const encodedUrl = encodeURIComponent(targetUrl);\n  const endpoint =\n    `https://api-ELbWqODdAgNY@36oqjsxjo775h3odjp3eev3y740deicu.lambda-url.us-west-2.on.aws/${encodedUrl}`;\n\n  const response = await fetch(endpoint, {\n    method: "GET",\n    headers: {\n      "X-Gateway-Authorization": `Bearer ${apiKey}`,\n      "Accept": "text/event-stream",\n    },\n  });\n\n  if (response.status === 401) throw new Error("Authentication failed: JWT Token missing or invalid");\n  if (response.status === 403) throw new Error("Target URL is blocked by GFW and cannot be accessed");\n  if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error: ${response.status}`);\n  if (!response.body) throw new Error("Response body is empty, cannot read stream");\n\n  const reader = response.body.getReader();\n  const decoder = new TextDecoder();\n  let buffer = "";\n  let fullContent = "";\n\n  while (true) {\n    const { done, value } = await reader.read();\n    if (done) break;\n\n    buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });\n    const lines = buffer.split("\\n");\n    buffer = lines.pop() ?? "";\n\n    for (const line of lines) {\n      if (!line.startsWith("data:")) continue;\n      const payload = line.slice(5).trim();\n      if (payload === "[DONE]") break;\n      if (payload) {\n        fullContent += payload;\n        onChunk?.(payload);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  return fullContent;\n}\n\n// Example: stream-fetch and print in real time\nawait fetchWebPageSSE("https://example.com", (chunk) => {\n  Deno.stdout.write(new TextEncoder().encode(chunk));\n});\n```\n\n### Frontend SSE Streaming Example (Web Platform)\n\nThe frontend must relay the streaming request through an Edge Function, which needs to proxy the upstream SSE stream to the client.\n\n```typescript\n/**\n * Fetches a web page via Edge Function SSE proxy, processing content chunks in real time.\n * @param url - The full URL of the target web page\n * @param onChunk - Callback function invoked each time a content chunk is received\n * @returns The complete Markdown text\n */\nasync function fetchWebPageStream(\n  url: string,\n  onChunk?: (chunk: string) => void\n): Promise<string> {\n  const res = await fetch(`${import.meta.env.VITE_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/web-reader`, {\n    method: "POST",\n    headers: {\n      "Content-Type": "application/json",\n      "Accept": "text/event-stream",\n    },\n    body: JSON.stringify({ url }),\n  });\n\n  if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Request failed: ${res.status}`);\n  if (!res.body) throw new Error("Response body is empty");\n\n  const reader = res.body.getReader();\n  const decoder = new TextDecoder();\n  let buffer = "";\n  let fullContent = "";\n\n  while (true) {\n    const { done, value } = await reader.read();\n    if (done) break;\n\n    buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });\n    const lines = buffer.split("\\n");\n    buffer = lines.pop() ?? "";\n\n    for (const line of lines) {\n      if (!line.startsWith("data:")) continue;\n      const payload = line.slice(5).trim();\n      if (payload === "[DONE]") break;\n      if (payload) {\n        fullContent += payload;\n        onChunk?.(payload);\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  return fullContent;\n}\n```', observation=<ObservationType.SKILL: 'skill'>, skill='web-reader', success=True, data={'object_storage_path': 'skill-aws-online:aws-prod/miaoda_skills/prompts/managed/web-reader/'})
</observation>

</action>

  <script>
  (function () {
    var noop = function noop() {};
    if ("performance" in window === false) {
      window.performance = {};
    }
    window.performance.mark = performance.mark || noop;
    window.performance.measure = performance.measure || noop;
    if ("now" in window.performance === false) {
      var nowOffset = Date.now();
      if (performance.timing && performance.timing.navigationStart) {
        nowOffset = performance.timing.navigationStart;
      }
      window.performance.now = function now() {
        return Date.now() - nowOffset;
      };
    }
  })();
  </script>

      var now = Date.now()
      var activationStart = 0
      try {

          activationStart = navEntry.activationStart;

COMMAND:

import re
import sys
html = sys.stdin.read()
# Find all script tags with type application/json
json_scripts = re.findall(r'<script type="application/json"[^>]*>(.*?)</script>', html, re.DOTALL)
print(f"Found {len(json_scripts)} JSON scripts")
for i, script in enumerate(json_scripts[:5]):
    print(f"\n--- Script {i} (len={len(script)}) ---")
    print(script[:500])
PY
</action>

**CmdRunAction (source=EventSource.AGENT, is_input=False)**
COMMAND:
curl -L -s "https://avitelservice.wixsite.com/-site/shop?page=5" | python3 - <<'PY'
import re, sys
html = sys.stdin.read()
# Search for patterns that look like product data
# Wix often uses data hooks or specific classes
# Let's look for aria-labels, alt texts, title tags containing product names
# First, just search for any meaningful text patterns
patterns = [
    r'<h[1-6][^>]*>([^<]{10,100})</h[1-6]>',  # headings
    r'alt="([^"]{10,100})"',  # alt texts
    r'title="([^"]{10,100})"',  # titles
    r'aria-label="([^"]{10,100})"',  # aria labels
]
for pat in patterns:
    matches = re.findall(pat, html)
    print(f"Pattern {pat}: {len(matches)} matches")
    for m in matches[:5]:
        print(f"  - {m[:100]}")
PY
</action>

COMMAND:

import re, json, sys
html = sys.stdin.read()
# Extract JSON-LD scripts
ld_scripts = re.findall(r'<script type="application/ld\+json"[^>]*>(.*?)</script>', html, re.DOTALL)
print(f"Found {len(ld_scripts)} JSON-LD scripts")
for i, script in enumerate(ld_scripts):
    try:
        data = json.loads(script)
        print(f"\n--- Script {i} ---")
        print(json.dumps(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)[:2000])
    except:
        print(f"\n--- Script {i} (not valid JSON) ---")
        print(script[:500])
PY
</action>

**CmdRunAction (source=EventSource.AGENT, is_input=False)**
COMMAND:
curl -L -s "https://avitelservice.wixsite.com/-site/product-page/hi-509faip8a-8-0mp-full-color-video-audio-dome-ip-camera-h-265" | python3 - <<'PY'
import re, sys
html = sys.stdin.read()
# Look for window.__ variables and script data
patterns = [
    r'window\.__([A-Z_]+)__\s*=\s*({.*?});',
    r'window\.__([A-Z_]+)\s*=\s*({.*?});',
    r'window\.__INITIAL_STATE__\s*=\s*(.*?);',
    r'window\.viewerModel\s*=\s*({.*?});',
]
for pat in patterns:
    matches = re.findall(pat, html, re.DOTALL)
    if matches:
        print(f"Pattern matched: {pat[:50]}")
        for m in matches[:2]:
            print(str(m)[:500])
            print("---")
PY
</action>

import re, sys
text = sys.stdin.read()
# Search for GraphQL-like strings and API endpoints
queries = re.findall(r'"([^"]*query[^"]*)"', text, re.IGNORECASE)
print(f"Found {len(queries)} query strings")
for q in queries[:20]:
    print(q[:300])
PY
</action>

**FileEditAction**
Path: [/workspace/app-cr1pkxisgqv5/tasks/scrape_avitelservice.py]
Thought: 
Command: create
Created File with Text:
```
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
import re
import time
import urllib.parse
import urllib.request
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
from pathlib import Path

import openpyxl
from openpyxl.styles import Font, Alignment, PatternFill

BASE_URL = "https://avitelservice.wixsite.com"
SHOP_PATH = "/-site"
ACCESS_TOKENS_URL = f"{BASE_URL}{SHOP_PATH}/_api/v1/access-tokens"
GRAPHQL_URL = f"{BASE_URL}{SHOP_PATH}/_api/wixstores-graphql-server/graphql"
SITEMAP_URL = f"{BASE_URL}{SHOP_PATH}/store-products-sitemap.xml"
STORE_APP_ID = "1380b703-ce81-ff05-f115-39571d94dfcd"
OUTPUT_XLSX = "/workspace/app-cr1pkxisgqv5/tasks/avitelservice_products.xlsx"

def http_request(url, method="GET", headers=None, data=None, timeout=30):
    req = urllib.request.Request(url, method=method)
    if headers:
        for k, v in headers.items():
            req.add_header(k, v)
    if data and isinstance(data, dict):
        data = json.dumps(data).encode("utf-8")
        req.add_header("Content-Type", "application/json")
    try:
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, data=data, timeout=timeout) as resp:
            return resp.read().decode("utf-8")
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        print(f"HTTP error {e.code} for {url}: {e.read().decode('utf-8', errors='ignore')[:500]}")
        raise

def get_access_token():
    raw = http_request(ACCESS_TOKENS_URL)
    data = json.loads(raw)
    return data["apps"][STORE_APP_ID]["instance"]

def graphql_query(token, query, variables=None):
    payload = {"query": query}
    if variables:
        payload["variables"] = variables
    raw = http_request(
        GRAPHQL_URL,
        method="POST",
        headers={"Authorization": token, "Content-Type": "application/json"},
        data=payload,
    )
    return json.loads(raw)

def fetch_sitemap():
    raw = http_request(SITEMAP_URL)
    root = ET.fromstring(raw)
    ns = {"ns": "http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9", "img": "http://www.google.com/schemas/sitemap-image/1.1"}
    products = []
    for url in root.findall("ns:url", ns):
        loc = url.find("ns:loc", ns).text
        image = url.find("img:image/img:loc", ns)
        image_url = image.text if image is not None else ""
        slug = loc.split("/product-page/")[-1]
        products.append({"url": loc, "slug": slug, "image_url": image_url})
    return products

def fetch_product(token, slug):
    query = """
    query($slug: String!) {
      product(slug: $slug, onlyVisible: true) {
        id
        name
        price
        comparePrice
        discountedPrice
        formattedPrice
        formattedComparePrice
        formattedDiscountedPrice
        currency
        sku
        isInStock
        isVisible
        isSellable
        ribbon
      }
    }
    """
    result = graphql_query(token, query, {"slug": slug})
    if result.get("errors"):
        print(f"GraphQL error for {slug}: {result['errors']}")
        return None
    return result.get("data", {}).get("product")

def build_excel(products):
    wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
    ws = wb.active
    ws.title = "Məhsullar"

    headers = [
        "Ad",
        "Qiymət",
        "Müqayisə Qiyməti",
        "Endirimli Qiymət",
        "Formatlı Qiymət",
        "Valyuta",
        "SKU",
        "Stokda",
        "Kateqoriya (Ribbon)",
        "Məhsul URL",
        "Şəkil URL",
    ]
    ws.append(headers)

    header_fill = PatternFill(start_color="366092", end_color="366092", fill_type="solid")
    header_font = Font(color="FFFFFF", bold=True)
    for cell in ws[1]:
        cell.fill = header_fill
        cell.font = header_font
        cell.alignment = Alignment(horizontal="center", vertical="center", wrap_text=True)

    for p in products:
        prod = p.get("product") or {}
        stock_text = "Bəli" if prod.get("isInStock") else "Xeyr"
        ws.append([
            prod.get("name", ""),
            prod.get("price", ""),
            prod.get("comparePrice", ""),
            prod.get("discountedPrice", ""),
            prod.get("formattedPrice", ""),
            prod.get("currency", ""),
            prod.get("sku", ""),
            stock_text,
            prod.get("ribbon", ""),
            p.get("url", ""),
            p.get("image_url", ""),
        ])

    # Sütun enlərini avtomatik tənzimlə
    for col in ws.columns:
        max_length = 0
        column = col[0].column_letter
        for cell in col:
            try:
                if cell.value:
                    max_length = max(max_length, len(str(cell.value)))
            except Exception:
                pass
        adjusted_width = min(max_length + 2, 80)
        ws.column_dimensions[column].width = adjusted_width

    wb.save(OUTPUT_XLSX)
    print(f"Excel faylı saxlandı: {OUTPUT_XLSX}")

def main():
    print("Access token əldə edilir...")
    token = get_access_token()
    print("Sitemap yüklənir...")
    sitemap_products = fetch_sitemap()
    print(f"Toplam {len(sitemap_products)} məhsul tapıldı.")

    enriched = []
    for idx, item in enumerate(sitemap_products, start=1):
        print(f"[{idx}/{len(sitemap_products)}] {item['slug']}")
        try:
            product_data = fetch_product(token, item["slug"])
            item["product"] = product_data
            enriched.append(item)
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"  Xəta: {e}")
            item["product"] = None
            enriched.append(item)
        time.sleep(0.3)

    build_excel(enriched)
    print(f"Hazır! {len(enriched)} məhsul Excel-ə yazıldı.")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

```

</action>

import re, sys
html = sys.stdin.read()
# Try to find product count or pagination info
title = re.search(r'<title>(.*?)</title>', html)
print(title.group(1) if title else 'no title')
# Count product-related patterns
print('price count:', len(re.findall(r'"price"', html)))
print('name count:', len(re.findall(r'"name"', html)))
PY

<script>
    window.__LOCALE__ = 'en';
    window.__ERROR_DATA__ = {

</action>

<action>
**CmdRunAction (source=EventSource.AGENT, is_input=False)**
COMMAND:
python3 - <<'PY'
import openpyxl, csv
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook('/workspace/app-cr1pkxisgqv5/tasks/avitelservice_products.xlsx')
ws = wb.active
with open('/workspace/app-cr1pkxisgqv5/tasks/avitelservice_products.csv', 'w', newline='', encoding='utf-8-sig') as f:
    writer = csv.writer(f)
    for row in ws.iter_rows(values_only=True):
        writer.writerow(row)
print("CSV yaradıldı: /workspace/app-cr1pkxisgqv5/tasks/avitelservice_products.csv")
PY
</action>

import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook('/workspace/app-cr1pkxisgqv5/avitelservice_products.xlsx')
ws = wb.active

with open('/workspace/app-cr1pkxisgqv5/avitelservice_products.csv', 'r', encoding='utf-8-sig') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()
print(f"Root CSV - sətir sayı: {len(lines) - 1}")
PY
